## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

Fixes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature, model, or metric
- [ ] Research, experiment, or evaluation update
- [ ] XAI or visualization update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Packaging, CI, or maintenance
- [ ] Refactor with no behavior change

## Validation

Commands run locally:

```text

```

## Data, model, and safety considerations

- [ ] Dataset sources, versions, and licenses are documented where relevant.
- [ ] This change does not include private participant data, credentials, or other secrets.
- [ ] New or changed metrics include a reference, definition, or validation rationale where appropriate.
- [ ] Clinical or biomechanical claims are supported by the paper, dataset, or tests.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [contribution guide](/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I updated documentation where appropriate.
- [ ] I ran the relevant lint, test, or build checks.
